_meta.description: Headline morphs from Table 2 — original headlines rewritten to incorporate a hypothesized feature. 252,000 were generated total; these are the published examples.

examples.hypothesis: Incorporating emotional triggers and a geographic reference into a headline affects engagement with a message.
examples.original: That Cheap Stuff I Just Bought At Walmart? Turns Out, It Cost Me $6000 More Than I Thought
examples.morph: Local Man's Walmart Bargain Turns Nightmare: Hidden Costs Rack Up $6000!

examples.hypothesis: Personalizing a message by focusing on an individual's story or reaction makes people more likely to engage with a message.
examples.original: 11 Tweets That Sum Up The Horror In North Carolina
examples.morph: North Carolina Resident's Heartwrenching Reaction Captures the Horror in 11 Tweets

examples.hypothesis: Excessive sensationalism and vague phrasing leads to less engagement with a message.
examples.original: An 11-year old ate a burger with a surprise ingredient. It was fatal, but ok according to the FDA.
examples.morph: 11-Year-Old's Fatal Reaction to FDA-Approved Burger Ingredient Sparks Outrage

examples.hypothesis: Introducing a narrative arc and highlighting societal themes leads to more engagement with a message.
examples.original: A woman shares some thoughts on why 'being normal' isn't all it's cracked up to be.
examples.morph: A Brave Woman's Journey From Conforming to Defying Society: Why Rejecting 'Normal' Opens the Door to True Self-Discovery

examples.hypothesis: Introducing a sense of mystery or unresolved tension affects engagement with a message.
examples.original: A Haunting Photo Of Martin Luther King Jr. Plus His Immortal Audio Clip
examples.morph: Discover the Mystery Behind Martin Luther King Jr.'s Last Haunting Photo and Immortal Words

examples.hypothesis: Introducing an element of surprise and emphasizing the impact of unawareness leads to more engagement with a message.
examples.original: Food Stamps Cannot Be Used To Buy Weapons. Except In Alaska.
examples.morph: You Thought Food Stamps Were Just for Groceries? Guess Again, Especially in Alaska!
